message:
fix: normalize resolved paths back to portable defaults in saveConfig

loadConfig() expands the Zod default "~/.cass-memory/playbook.yaml" to
an absolute path at runtime. If saveConfig() persisted that absolute
path, it would become stale when CASS_MEMORY_HOME or XDG_DATA_HOME
later changes (the saved absolute path wouldn't match the legacy
default, so loadConfig's post-processing wouldn't replace it).

saveConfig now detects when playbookPath/diaryDir equal the resolved
global dir equivalents and normalizes them back to the portable default
strings before writing config.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
